nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 森林砍伐是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括角蜂鸟、长尾妍蜂鸟、White-fronted nunbird等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 黑冠八色鸫
nodes.summary: 黑冠八色鸫（Graceful pitta，学名 Erythropitta venusta），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于蘇門答臘島、印度尼西亚、森林砍伐，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、猎捕压力、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 蘇門答臘島
nodes.summary: 蘇門答臘島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联94种鸟类，包括罗氏山鹧鸪、蘇門答臘山鷓鴣、長嘴山鶉等94种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 印度尼西亚
nodes.summary: 印度尼西亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联297种鸟类，包括细斑树鸭、白腹麻鸭、太平洋黑鴨等297种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It occurs in Sumatra in Indonesia, where its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests

links.evidence: It occurs in Sumatra in Indonesia, where its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits dense, moist woods with a thick understory of plants, but its habitat has been decreasing rapidly due to deforestation owing to the demand for palm oil, which Indonesia is the largest producer of

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It occurs in Sumatra in Indonesia, where its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The graceful pitta has been legally protected from hunting since 1931. However, its population is primarily threatened by deforestation, besides minor agriculture and aquaculture

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The graceful pitta has been legally protected from hunting since 1931. However, its population is primarily threatened by deforestation, besides minor agriculture and aquaculture
